headline: Race 1 done and new rules added
body:
🏁 Race Day One Recap: Record Sets the Pace
The first night of racing is officially in the books, and it was a masterclass in performance. A massive congratulations to Oliver Record, who dominated the track by securing victories in both races.

Oliver didn’t just win—he left the competition in the rearview mirror, clocking in two fastest laps and finishing "lightyears" ahead of the pack. It was an incredible display of skill and speed.

📢 Important Update: Rule Changes
Following the events of the opening night, the officials have implemented new rules to ensure the best racing experience moving forward.

Action Required: Please review the updated regulations immediately to stay compliant for the next heat.

Great racing to everyone involved, and we'll see you at the next green light!
